title: Slide 5: 3D SPHERES
prompt: Presentation slide 5: "3D SPHERES". A chart of 5 percentage values (20%, 40%, 50%, 100%, 80%). Geometric, axis-aligned. In 3D, lift to a clean bar/column chart on a stage with the title floating above — corporate keynote aesthetic, not naturalistic.
